task_completion.description: Agent accesses the Nx Witness VMS API or system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the agent reading '/home/ga/nx_token.txt' and making curl/Python requests to https://localhost:7001, or a browser showing the VMS web interface or API documentation.

task_completion.description: Agent retrieves and analyzes camera data for recording status and layout inclusion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Script logic or terminal commands querying camera and layout endpoints, filtering for cameras with recording disabled or not present in any layout.

task_completion.description: Agent retrieves and analyzes user data for layout assignments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Script logic or terminal commands querying user and layout endpoints, filtering for users with no layouts assigned or shared.

task_completion.description: Agent constructs the JSON report with the required structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code or text editor showing the construction of a JSON object containing keys like 'report_timestamp', 'system_name', 'total_cameras', 'gaps', and 'summary'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the final JSON report to the expected output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the report being written to '/home/ga/coverage_gap_report.json' (e.g., via script output, file redirection, or text editor save).

integrity.description: Agent actually interacted with the VMS API rather than hallucinating the system state.
integrity.visual_evidence: API requests are visible in the terminal or script, utilizing the authentication token to fetch real system data.

integrity.description: The JSON report is generated using actual data retrieved from the API.
integrity.visual_evidence: Script variables map API response data to the JSON structure, rather than using hardcoded placeholder values for the gaps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must analyze the Nx Witness VMS system via its REST API (https://localhost:7001) to find configuration gaps. Authentication uses a bearer token (available in /home/ga/nx_token.txt). The final output must be a JSON file saved exactly to /home/ga/coverage_gap_report.json containing the specified structure.
